available.name: audio_energy
best_for: finding where ambient music gets interesting (skip quiet intros)
choosing the best offset for a music track in a video
determining if a music track needs looping for a longer video
available.install_instructions:
Install ffmpeg:
  Windows: winget install ffmpeg
  macOS: brew install ffmpeg
  Linux: sudo apt install ffmpeg

available.name: audio_probe
best_for: validating media file format and codec
available.install_instructions:
Install ffmpeg (includes ffprobe):
  Windows: winget install ffmpeg
  macOS: brew install ffmpeg
  Linux: sudo apt install ffmpeg

available.name: composition_validator
best_for: catching audio-video duration mismatches before render
pre-flight check before expensive render operations
available.install_instructions: Requires ffprobe on PATH (part of ffmpeg).

available.name: frame_sampler
available.install_instructions: Install FFmpeg: https://ffmpeg.org/download.html

available.name: scene_detect
available.install_instructions:
FFmpeg is required. For better detection install PySceneDetect:
pip install scenedetect[opencv]

available.name: transcriber
available.install_instructions:
pip install faster-whisper  # CPU mode
pip install faster-whisper[gpu]  # GPU mode (requires CUDA)
pip install whisperx  # For diarization support

available.name: video_understand
available.install_instructions: pip install transformers torch  # For CLIP/BLIP-2 visual understanding

available.name: visual_qa
available.install_instructions: Install FFmpeg: https://ffmpeg.org/download.html

unavailable.name: face_tracker
unavailable.install_instructions:
For best results install MediaPipe:
pip install mediapipe opencv-python

Falls back to OpenCV Haar cascade (ships with opencv-python).

available.name: audio_enhance
available.install_instructions: Install FFmpeg: https://ffmpeg.org/download.html

available.name: audio_mixer
available.install_instructions:
FFmpeg is required. pydub is optional for advanced mixing:
pip install pydub

unavailable.name: lip_sync
unavailable.install_instructions:
Option 1: pip install wav2lip (if available)
Option 2: Clone https://github.com/Rudrabha/Wav2Lip and set WAV2LIP_PATH env var
Requires: PyTorch with CUDA, ffmpeg

unavailable.name: talking_head
unavailable.install_instructions:
Clone https://github.com/OpenTalker/SadTalker and set SADTALKER_PATH env var
Requires: PyTorch with CUDA, ffmpeg
pip install sadtalker  # or clone the repo

available.name: color_grade
available.install_instructions: Install FFmpeg: https://ffmpeg.org/download.html

available.name: face_enhance
available.install_instructions: Install FFmpeg: https://ffmpeg.org/download.html

unavailable.name: bg_remove
unavailable.install_instructions:
pip install rembg       # CPU mode
pip install rembg[gpu]  # GPU mode (requires CUDA + onnxruntime-gpu)

unavailable.name: eye_enhance
unavailable.install_instructions:
For best results install MediaPipe and OpenCV:
pip install mediapipe opencv-python numpy

Without MediaPipe, falls back to FFmpeg eye-region filter (less precise).

unavailable.name: face_restore
unavailable.install_instructions: pip install gfpgan  # Includes CodeFormer support. Requires PyTorch.

unavailable.name: upscale
unavailable.install_instructions: pip install realesrgan  # Requires PyTorch with CUDA

available.name: code_snippet
available.install_instructions: pip install Pygments Pillow

available.name: diagram_gen
available.install_instructions:
For Mermaid diagrams:
  npm install -g @mermaid-js/mermaid-cli
For Pillow-based diagrams (fallback):
  pip install Pillow

unavailable.name: math_animate
unavailable.install_instructions:
Install ManimCE:
  pip install manim
  manim checkhealth
Requires: Python 3.8+, FFmpeg, LaTeX (optional, for math formulas)
  Windows: choco install miktex ffmpeg
  macOS: brew install mactex ffmpeg
  Linux: sudo apt install texlive-full ffmpeg

available.name: flux_image
available.install_instructions:
Set FAL_KEY to your fal.ai API key.
  Get one at https://fal.ai/dashboard/keys

available.name: google_imagen
best_for: fast generation with multiple aspect ratios
available.install_instructions:
Set GOOGLE_API_KEY (or GEMINI_API_KEY) to your Google AI API key.
  Get one at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey

available.name: image_gen
available.install_instructions:
Set one of these environment variables:
  OPENAI_API_KEY — for DALL-E 3
  FAL_KEY — for FLUX via fal.ai
Or install diffusers for local generation:
  pip install diffusers transformers accelerate torch

available.name: openai_image
available.install_instructions:
Set OPENAI_API_KEY to your OpenAI API key.
  pip install openai

available.name: pexels_image
best_for: free stock images — no cost, no attribution required
available.install_instructions:
Set PEXELS_API_KEY to your Pexels API key.
  Get one free at https://www.pexels.com/api/

available.name: pixabay_image
best_for: free stock images — no cost, no attribution required
available.install_instructions:
Set PIXABAY_API_KEY to your Pixabay API key.
  Get one free at https://pixabay.com/api/docs/

available.name: recraft_image
available.install_instructions:
Set FAL_KEY to your fal.ai API key.
  Get one at https://fal.ai/dashboard/keys

unavailable.name: local_diffusion
unavailable.install_instructions:
Install diffusers for local Stable Diffusion:
  pip install diffusers transformers accelerate torch

available.name: music_gen
available.install_instructions:
Set the ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable:
  export ELEVENLABS_API_KEY=your_key_here
Get a key at https://elevenlabs.io

available.name: suno_music
best_for: full song generation with vocals and lyrics
available.install_instructions:
Set the SUNO_API_KEY environment variable:
  export SUNO_API_KEY=your_key_here
Get a key at https://sunoapi.org/api-key

available.name: pixabay_music
best_for: quick background music with zero setup (no API key)
royalty-free music for any commercial project
available.install_instructions:
No setup required. Pixabay Music is free and needs no API key.
Note: This tool scrapes the Pixabay website. If it breaks, the
site's HTML structure may have changed. Use freesound_music as fallback.

unavailable.name: freesound_music
best_for: searching by mood, genre, or instrument tags
finding loops, drones, and textural audio
unavailable.install_instructions:
Set the FREESOUND_API_KEY environment variable:
  export FREESOUND_API_KEY=your_key_here
Get a free key at https://freesound.org/apiv2/apply/

available.name: subtitle_gen
available.install_instructions: No external dependencies required.

available.name: remotion_caption_burn
available.install_instructions:
Remotion (optional, preferred): npm install in remotion-composer/
FFmpeg (required for fallback): https://ffmpeg.org/download.html

available.name: elevenlabs_tts
available.install_instructions:
Set the ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable:
  export ELEVENLABS_API_KEY=your_key_here
Get a key at https://elevenlabs.io

available.name: google_tts
available.install_instructions:
Set GOOGLE_API_KEY to your Google Cloud API key with Text-to-Speech enabled.
  Enable the API at https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/library/texttospeech.googleapis.com
  Or use GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS for service account auth.

available.name: openai_tts
best_for: API-based production when ElevenLabs is unavailable
available.install_instructions:
Set the OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable:
  export OPENAI_API_KEY=your_key_here
Get a key at https://platform.openai.com/

available.name: piper_tts
available.install_instructions:
Install Piper TTS:
  pip install piper-tts
Or download from https://github.com/rhasspy/piper/releases
Then download a voice model:
  piper --download-dir ~/.piper/models --model en_US-lessac-medium

available.name: heygen_video
best_for: premium cloud video generation without local GPU setup
fast access to VEO, Sora, Kling, Runway, and Seedance providers
available.install_instructions:
Set the HEYGEN_API_KEY environment variable:
  set HEYGEN_API_KEY=your_key_here
Get a key at https://app.heygen.com/settings/api

available.name: kling_video
best_for: cinematic B-roll with highest visual fidelity
available.install_instructions:
Set FAL_KEY to your fal.ai API key.
  Get one at https://fal.ai/dashboard/keys

available.name: ltx_video_modal
best_for: self-hosted cloud GPU rendering for LTX without local workstation dependence
available.install_instructions:
Set the MODAL_LTX2_ENDPOINT_URL environment variable to your deployed LTX endpoint:
  set MODAL_LTX2_ENDPOINT_URL=https://<your-modal-endpoint>

available.name: minimax_video
best_for: prompt-following with camera directions (framing, motion, composition)
available.install_instructions:
Set FAL_KEY to your fal.ai API key.
  Get one at https://fal.ai/dashboard/keys

available.name: pexels_video
best_for: real-world B-roll footage (cities, nature, people, offices)
free stock video — no cost, no attribution required
available.install_instructions:
Set PEXELS_API_KEY to your Pexels API key.
  Get one free at https://www.pexels.com/api/

available.name: pixabay_video
best_for: free stock video — no cost, no attribution required
available.install_instructions:
Set PIXABAY_API_KEY to your Pixabay API key.
  Get one free at https://pixabay.com/api/docs/

available.name: runway_video
best_for: highest overall video quality (#1 Elo rating)
available.install_instructions:
Set RUNWAY_API_KEY to your Runway API key.
  Get one at https://app.runwayml.com/settings/api-keys

available.name: veo_video
best_for: videos with synchronized dialogue and audio
ambient sound and music generation built in
available.install_instructions:
Set FAL_KEY or FAL_AI_API_KEY to your fal.ai API key.
  Get one at https://fal.ai/dashboard/keys

unavailable.name: cogvideo_video
best_for: teams that want an explicit CogVideo family path in the registry
unavailable.install_instructions:
Enable local video generation and install the diffusers stack:
  set VIDEO_GEN_LOCAL_ENABLED=true
  pip install diffusers transformers accelerate torch pillow requests
Use a GPU with the VRAM profile listed on the selected tool.

unavailable.name: hunyuan_video
best_for: local generation when Hunyuan motion behavior fits the brief
teams that want one known Hunyuan baseline instead of multiple variants
unavailable.install_instructions:
Enable local video generation and install the diffusers stack:
  set VIDEO_GEN_LOCAL_ENABLED=true
  pip install diffusers transformers accelerate torch pillow requests
Use a GPU with the VRAM profile listed on the selected tool.

unavailable.name: ltx_video_local
best_for: local LTX workflows already tuned around LTX prompting
teams that want one dedicated LTX local path in the registry
unavailable.install_instructions:
Enable local video generation and install the diffusers stack:
  set VIDEO_GEN_LOCAL_ENABLED=true
  pip install diffusers transformers accelerate torch pillow requests
Use a GPU with the VRAM profile listed on the selected tool.

unavailable.name: wan_video
best_for: best quality-to-VRAM ratio for local generation
local pipelines that still want image-to-video support
unavailable.install_instructions:
Enable local video generation and install the diffusers stack:
  set VIDEO_GEN_LOCAL_ENABLED=true
  pip install diffusers transformers accelerate torch pillow requests
Use a GPU with the VRAM profile listed on the selected tool.

available.name: auto_reframe
available.install_instructions:
FFmpeg is required. For face-tracked reframing, also install:
pip install mediapipe opencv-python

Without MediaPipe/OpenCV, falls back to center-crop.
